hub_subtitle: Business English para as reuniões com o time Global da Sanofi, congressos médicos e a apresentação de agosto

lesson.menu_title: What's Happening Right Now -- Describing Live Situations
lesson.menu_desc: Dar um status ao vivo para o time Global: o que a sua equipe está fazendo AGORA no Brasil -- o lançamento, o campo e os resultados em tempo real, com o present continuous -- 34 slides
lesson.subtitle: Lesson 11 -- What's Happening Right Now
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Emmanuele Orrico | Lesson 11 -- What's Happening Right Now (Present Continuous Consolidation)
lesson.grammar_point: present continuous for live and temporary situations (review / consolidation)

listenings.text: Good morning, team. Here is a quick update on where we are right now. The launch is going well. In the South, our reps are visiting more than twenty doctors a day, and we are seeing strong growth. In the Southeast, the situation is a little different. Access is slow, so we are adjusting our plan this week. Right now, I am monitoring the numbers in real time, and I am tracking every region on one dashboard. One team is handling the private market, and another team is running the campaign in the public sector. Please send me your field reports by Friday. We are all on the ground, and we are moving fast. Thank you.

Hi Emmanuele, it's Claire, from the Global team. I am calling about our meeting this afternoon. The VP wants a quick status of the Brazil launch, so please be ready. He is going to ask what is happening right now, in real time, not last month's numbers. So, three things. First, tell him what your team is doing on the ground this week. Second, mention the challenges you are handling and how you are adjusting the plan. And third, show that you are monitoring the results closely. Keep it short and clear. You are doing great work down there. See you at three.

extra_audio.text: Hi David, thanks for the call. Let me give you a quick status. Right now, my team is running the launch in three regions. At the moment, we are seeing good growth in the South. We are handling one challenge, so we are adjusting the plan this week. We are monitoring the results in real time.

items.situation: David opens the call: "Give me a quick status of the launch."
tips: Right now, my team is running the launch in three regions.
At the moment, we are launching in the South and the Southeast.

items.situation: "What are you seeing on the ground this week?"
tips: Our reps are visiting doctors every day, and we are seeing good growth.
On the ground, we are seeing strong interest from the doctors.

items.situation: "Are you facing any challenges right now?"
tips: Yes, we are handling a small access problem, so we are adjusting the plan.
Access is slow in the Southeast, so we are adjusting our plan this week.
We are monitoring the results in real time.
I am tracking every region on one dashboard, in real time.

items.situation: "What is your team doing about the public market?"
tips: One team is running the campaign in the public sector.
Right now, we are handling the public market with a separate team.

items.situation: David asks about your routine: "How often do you visit doctors?"
tips: Our reps visit doctors every day — that is the routine.
